specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services, and we've built a solid reputation among boat owners who depend on reliable, knowledgeable hands to take care of their boats the right way.

Our team handles everything from thorough boat surveying and inspection — whether you're buying, selling, or just want peace of mind — to professional diving and underwater services that keep your hull, props, and running gear in shape without hauling out. We also specialize in marine AC and climate control systems, keeping your cabin comfortable on the water, and marine plumbing and sanitation, so your onboard systems stay clean, functional, and up to code.

We serve boat owners across South Florida and surrounding communities, working within a 60-mile radius to bring quality marine service directly to where your vessel is. Whether you're docked in Annapolis or cruising the Chesapeake Bay area, we understand that your boat is a serious investment — and we treat it that way. Our commitment is straightforward: show up, do the work right, and make sure you're back on the water with confidence.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today.

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: Ben's Boatworks conducts thorough marine surveys and vessel inspections to assess structural integrity, mechanical systems, and overall condition. Whether you're purchasing a new boat, renewing insurance, or performing a routine condition check, a professional survey gives you a clear picture of exactly what you're working with.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our underwater diving services cover hull cleaning, propeller inspection, zinc replacement, and running gear assessment — all performed in the water without the need for a haul-out. Keeping your underwater surfaces clean and your hardware in good shape directly impacts performance, fuel efficiency, and long-term hull health.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Ben's Boatworks installs, services, and repairs marine air conditioning and climate control systems to keep your vessel's cabin comfortable in warm weather. We work on both self-contained and chilled water systems, diagnosing refrigerant issues, pump failures, and electrical faults to restore proper cooling efficiently.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: We handle marine plumbing repairs and sanitation system maintenance, including through-hull fittings, seacocks, holding tanks, marine heads, and discharge systems. Properly functioning onboard plumbing and sanitation is essential for safety, compliance with marine regulations, and a clean, odor-free boating experience.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection report
Hull cleaning and zinc replacement via underwater diving service
Marine AC system diagnosis, repair, and refrigerant recharge
Holding tank replacement and marine sanitation system overhaul
Propeller and running gear inspection without vessel haul-out
Through-hull fitting and seacock inspection or replacement
Insurance or insurance renewal marine survey and documentation
